name: @woyax/mcp-max-messenger
description: MCP server for MAX Messenger — Russia's national messenger by VK. Send messages, read chats, manage conversations via AI.

MAX_TOKEN.description: Your MAX bot token. Get it from max.ru

http.description: Hosted version — contact author for access

tools.name: get_bot_info
tools.description: Get information about the MAX bot (name, ID, username)

tools.name: get_chats
tools.description: List all group chats the bot participates in

tools.name: get_messages
tools.description: Read messages from a MAX chat

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a text message to a MAX chat or user

tools.name: edit_message
tools.description: Edit the text of an existing message

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: Delete a message sent by the bot

tools.name: get_chat_members
tools.description: Get the list of participants in a group chat

tools.name: pin_message
tools.description: Pin a message in a group chat

tools.name: unpin_message
tools.description: Unpin the currently pinned message in a group chat
